subcodes.first_line: O enlightened seeker of the Love of God! The world of existence is as a body, and the spirit of that body is the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستشرق نور محبه الله عالم وجود جسد است و روح این جسد محبت الله است
subcodes.subjects: @one universal law; attractive power of love, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world
